process.title: Our Quality Process
process.subtitle: Four-stage quality control from raw material to dispatch

incoming.title: Incoming Material
incoming.desc: Spectrometric analysis and dimensional inspection of all incoming brass raw materials.

inProcess.title: In-Process Control
inProcess.desc: Real-time SPC monitoring and dimensional checks during CNC machining operations.

final.title: Final Inspection
final.desc: 100% visual inspection and statistical sampling for dimensional accuracy and surface quality.

dispatch.title: Pre-Dispatch Audit
dispatch.desc: Final audit with material test certificates and quality documentation before shipment.

equipment.subtitle: State-of-the-art quality laboratory with calibrated instruments

certifications.intro: BrassCraft Industries maintains rigorous certification standards to ensure our products meet the highest quality and compliance requirements worldwide. Our certifications are independently audited and regularly renewed.

hero.title: Privacy Policy
hero.subtitle: How we collect, use, and protect your information

dataCollection.title: Information We Collect
dataCollection.content: We collect information you provide directly, such as your name, email address, phone number, and company details when you fill out contact forms, request quotes, or subscribe to our newsletter.

dataUsage.title: How We Use Your Information
dataUsage.content: We use your information to respond to inquiries, process quote requests, send relevant product updates if you have opted in, and improve our services. We do not sell your personal information to third parties.

cookies.title: Cookies
cookies.content: Our website uses essential cookies to ensure proper functionality. We may use analytics cookies to understand how visitors interact with our website. You can manage your cookie preferences through your browser settings.

contactPrivacy.title: Contact Us About Privacy
contactPrivacy.content: If you have questions about our privacy practices or would like to exercise your data rights, please contact us at info@brasscraftindustries.com.

home.title: Precision Brass Components Manufacturer
home.description: BrassCraft Industries - Leading manufacturer of precision brass fittings, valves, connectors, and components. ISO 9001 certified, exporting to 45+ countries since 1995.

about.title: About Us
about.description: Learn about BrassCraft Industries' three decades of brass manufacturing excellence. ISO certified, 500+ employees, exporting to 45+ countries from Jamnagar, India.

products.title: Our Products
products.description: Explore our comprehensive range of precision brass components including fittings, valves, connectors, fasteners, inserts, and electrical components.

services.title: Our Services
services.description: CNC precision machining, hot forging, quality testing, custom manufacturing, surface finishing, and export logistics for brass components.

quality.title: Quality Assurance
quality.description: ISO 9001:2015 certified quality management with four-stage inspection process. Spectrometric analysis, CMM, pressure testing, and more.

certifications.title: Certifications & Compliance
certifications.description: ISO 9001:2015, ISO 14001:2015, CE Marking, RoHS and REACH compliance. Internationally certified brass component manufacturing.

infrastructure.title: Our Infrastructure
infrastructure.description: 45,000 sq ft manufacturing facility with 24 CNC turning centres, 8 machining centres, and fully equipped quality laboratory.

blog.title: Industry Insights & Blog
blog.description: Expert articles on brass manufacturing, CNC machining, material selection, quality standards, and industry best practices.

contact.title: Contact Us
contact.description: Get in touch with BrassCraft Industries for inquiries, quotations, or technical support. Located in Jamnagar, Gujarat, India.
